feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Global carbonate production and accumulation–Updated present-day estimates and future projections
entry.content:
Authors: G Auer, C Pederson, Z Steiner, K de Mutsert... - EGU26, 2026

Abstract: There are two primary mechanisms for carbon transfer into the geological record within the ocean: the organic sink and the inorganic carbon sink. The inorganic carbon sink (ie, the long-term preservation of carbonate minerals in the geologic ...

Alert: Gerald Auer (author alert)

entry.title: Reply to Hu: Reasoning traces need not be faithful to account for the cost of human thinking
entry.content:
Authors: AG de Varda, FP D'Elia, H Kean, A Lampinen... - Proceedings of the National ..., 2026

Abstract: Hu (1) raises two concerns about our finding that reasoning costs in large reasoning models (LRMs) and humans are aligned (2): a) that chains of thought (CoTs) may not faithfully represent the computations that lead to the final answer, and b) that CoT ...

Alert: Evelina (Ev) Fedorenko (author alert)

entry.title: The genome sequence of the Lesser Horseshoe Bat, Rhinolophus hipposideros (Bechstein, 1800)(Chiroptera: Rhinolophidae)
entry.content:
Authors: I Alvarez van Tussenbroek, SC Vernes, H Nicolaou... - Wellcome Open Research, 2026

Abstract: We present a genome assembly from an individual female Rhinolophus hipposideros (Lesser Horseshoe Bat; Chordata; Mammalia; Chiroptera; Rhinolophidae). The assembly contains two haplotypes with total lengths of 2 171.31 ...

Alert: Sonja Vernes (author alert)

entry.title: Harmonic morphisms and dynamical invariants in network renormalization
entry.content:
Authors: FM Guadagnuolo, M Nurisso, F Galluzzi, A Allard... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Renormalization of complex networks requires principled criteria for assessing whether a coarse-graining preserves dynamical content. We prove that discrete harmonic morphisms--surjective maps preserving harmonic functions--provide the ...

Alert: Giovanni Petri (author alert)

entry.title: Earth system instability explains redox paradox during late Cambrian SPICE event
entry.content:
Authors: K Sheng, ZH Li, JL Zhou, YB Lin, GL Xiong, GY Ren... - Science Advances, 2026

Abstract: The late Neoproterozoic–early Paleozoic (~ 600 to 520 million years ago) witnessed a fundamental shift under atmosphere-ocean redox conditions, where pulsed ocean oxygenation events (OOEs) were replaced by episodic ocean anoxic events (OAEs) ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Complexity

Alert: Timothy Lenton (author alert)

entry.title: Mapping of subjective account into interpreted clusters (MOSAIC): Topic Modelling and LLM applies to stroboscopically phenomenology
entry.content:
Authors: R Beauté, DJ Schwartzman, G Dumas, J Crook...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Stroboscopic light stimulation (SLS) on closed eyes typically induces simple visual hallucinations, characterized by vivid, geometric, and colourful patterns. A dataset of 898 sentences, extracted from 407 open subjective reports, was recently compiled as ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Consciousness

Alert: Anil Seth (author alert)

entry.content:
Authors: MT Sherman, RA Kievit, AK Seth, H Lau, SM Fleming

Abstract: Domain-General Enhancements of Metacognitive Ability Through Adaptive Training Jason Carpenter University College London and University of California, Los Angeles Maxine T. Sherman University of Sussex Rogier A. Kievit University College London ...
